name: Potato Farmer
rules: Stop to harvest crops whenever possible

name: King
rules: Refer to yourself in third person

name: Merchant
rules: Never give anything away for free

name: Blacksmith
rules: Only use tools you crafted yourself

name: Rogue
rules: Sneak whenever a hostile mob is nearby
Take one item from every chest you find

name: Wizard
rules: Always carry at least one potion
Blame unexplained events on dark magic

name: Knight
rules: Protect weaker players at all costs

name: Bard
rules: Narrate your actions out loud in song
Never fight without a musical intro

name: Hermit
rules: Live in the most remote base you can find

name: Gladiator
rules: Challenge anyone who insults you to a duel
Never wear a full set of armour

name: Cartographer
rules: Map every new area you enter
Refuse to travel without a compass
Share directions with anyone who asks

name: Executioner
rules: Never show mercy to hostile mobs

name: Alchemist
rules: Brew a potion before every expedition
Refuse to drink anything you didn't make

name: Fisherman
rules: Fish at every body of water you pass
Never turn down a trade involving fish

name: Jester
rules: Crack a joke in every conversation
Prank at least one player per session
